data.description: In the history/conversation log entry at 3/31/2026 08:57:45 AM (44f1, Prompt 11 / Take 11, debug target term-1774873034101-2p7pxo), the screen displays the agent as "CODEX GPT-5.4 5.4" even though the response metadata for that message shows the model/provider is OpenRouter. The history list should display the agent name from the response metadata field used for model/provider identity, not an incorrect or hardcoded model label.
